recommendations.title: 976-EVIL
recommendations.overview: A bullied unpopular high school student named Hoax finds an ad for 976-EVIL, a number that provides daily 'horrorscopes'. But when he calls the number he gains demonic powers, which he uses to seek vengeance against those who bullied him.

recommendations.title: Faults
recommendations.overview: Claire is under the grip of a mysterious new cult called Faults. Desperate to be reunited with their daughter, Claire's parents recruit one of the world's foremost experts on mind control, Ansel Roth.

recommendations.title: The Babysitter
recommendations.overview: When Cole stays up past his bedtime, he discovers that his hot babysitter is part of a Satanic cult that will stop at nothing to keep him quiet.

recommendations.title: Black Candles
recommendations.overview: A young woman travels with her partner to England on the unexpected death of her brother. Staying with her sister-in-law, she finds her companion soon drawn into a satanic cult based in the house whose rites seem to centre somewhat on large-scale sex

recommendations.title: Inferno
recommendations.overview: A young man returns from Rome to his sister's satanic New York apartment house.

recommendations.title: The Babysitter: Killer Queen
recommendations.overview: Two years after defeating a satanic cult led by his babysitter Bee, Cole's trying to forget his past and focus on surviving high school. But when old enemies unexpectedly return, Cole will once again have to outsmart the forces of evil.

recommendations.title: Monster Party
recommendations.overview: Three teenage thieves infiltrate a mansion dinner party, unaware that it is secretly being hosted by a serial killer cult for the social elite.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Deader
recommendations.overview: When a tough-as-nails reporter is lead to a mysterious cult and the evil Pinhead, any moment could be her last.

recommendations.title: Race with the Devil
recommendations.overview: Two couples vacationing together in an R.V. from Texas to Colorado are terrorized after they witness a murder during a Satanic ritual.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.
